mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO outbox_event ( oeid, event_type, aggregate_id, payload, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{entry.oeid}, #{entry.eventType}, #{entry.aggregateId}, #{entry.payload}, #{entry.status}, #{entry.createdAt, typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{entry.updatedAt, typeHandler=com.dogancaglar.common.db.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler} )
ON CONFLICT (oeid, created_at) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO edge_watermarks (edge_node_id, forwarded_up_to) VALUES (#{edgeNodeId}, #{forwardedUpTo}) ON CONFLICT (edge_node_id) DO UPDATE SET forwarded_up_to = EXCLUDED.forwarded_up_to
